keywords.job: I am the arena master. I supervise all challenges that take place in this arena and train true fighters.
keywords.name: I am called Ormuhn.
keywords.time: Time only matters to you while you are mortal. Another instrument in the hands of the false gods to fool us all.
keywords.temple: The temple takes care of your Uthun. In this arena we challenge your Akh.
keywords.pharaoh: The pharaoh, our mighty leader, is an unliving god.
keywords.oldpharaoh: The pharaoh will know why he granted him a chance to ascend.
keywords.scarab: Scarabs might be sacred, but they are also a challenge. If you are able to overcome one of them, its spirit will forgive you. The everlasting sand will grant him rebirth anyway.
keywords.chosen: I am one of the chosen. To become like me you have to serve the pharaoh and his temple faithfully.
keywords.tibia: Tibia is a place kept in the thrall of the greedy false gods. One day though our pharaoh will free Tibia and guide all of its people to ascension.
keywords.carlin: These cities are nests of corruption and lies. For those who know the treason of the false gods is almost tangible there.
keywords.thais: These cities are nests of corruption and lies. For those who know the treason of the false gods is almost tangible there.
keywords.edron: These cities are nests of corruption and lies. For those who know the treason of the false gods is almost tangible there.
keywords.venore: These cities are nests of corruption and lies. For those who know the treason of the false gods is almost tangible there.
keywords.kazordoon: Dwarves are worthy warriors. Still their mortal Akh makes them prey to true death and so their lives are wasted.
keywords.dwarves: Dwarves are worthy warriors. Still their mortal Akh makes them prey to true death and so their lives are wasted.
keywords.dwarfes: Dwarves are worthy warriors. Still their mortal Akh makes them prey to true death and so their lives are wasted.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Elves are nothing but feeble treehuggers.
keywords.elves: Elves are nothing but feeble treehuggers.
keywords.elfes: Elves are nothing but feeble treehuggers.
keywords.darama: This continent will be the first to prosper under the guidance of our pharaoh.
keywords.darashia: The people there are not totally lost to the false gods yet. Who knows? They may be saved yet.
keywords.daraman: A mere mortal prophet. As was to be expected, his mortality blurred his visions of ascension.
keywords.ankrahmun: This is the shelter of the mortal flock who listens to the teachings of our pharaoh.
keywords.mortality: Your curse of mortality can be lifted if you only prove youself worthy in the eyes of our pharaoh.
keywords.false: These greedy reapers of souls are the true scourge of poor mortals like you. Your living Akh makes you vulnerable for their attacks. Withstand them and you will get a chance to be raised to the exalted state of undeath.
keywords.gods: These greedy reapers of souls are the true scourge of poor mortals like you. Your living Akh makes you vulnerable for their attacks. Withstand them and you will get a chance to be raised to the exalted state of undeath.
keywords.ascension: Ascension is achieved in many steps. The first and most important step is unquestioning loyal service to our pharaoh.
keywords.Akh'rah: You should discuss such topics with our priests. I don't care too much for these matters.
keywords.Uthun: You should discuss such topics with our priests. I don't care too much for these matters.
keywords.Akh: As far as I know this is what you would call your body. Ask a priest for further information.
keywords.Rah: That is your so-called soul. Ask a priest for further information.
keywords.uthun: All the things you remember form your uthun. Ask a priest for further information.
keywords.arena: If you wish to test your mortal Akh you are at the right place.
keywords.palace: The palace is guarded by the elite forces of the chosen.
keywords.spell: Sorry, I only sell spells to knights.

texts: I am the arena master. I supervise all challenges that take place in this arena and train true fighters.

entries.response: In this category I have 'Light Healing' and 'Antidote'.
In this category I have 'Light', 'Find Person' and 'Great Light'.
For level 8 I have 'Find Person' and 'Light'.
Sorry, I have only spells for magic level 0, 1, 2 and 3.
You already know how to cast this spell.
You have to be magic level %A to learn this spell.
Return when you have enough gold.
Here you are. Look in your spellbook for the pronunciation of this spell.
